summary: Classified the 10 open PRs in this live inventory shard independently. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive seed ref was detected, and the job disables merge, fix PRs, instant close, and low-signal PR closeout. The only human escalations are PR-local maintainer/author judgment points; all other PRs should remain open outside this cluster.

actions.reason: Keep open as an independent focused PR; this inventory job cannot repair, merge, or close it.
